headline: Discount chain closing 75 stores, admits 1,000s are 'substandard'
summary: Businesses rarely come out and tell you that they have a bad product, but on rare occasions, embracing the need for change and admitting problems has worked to help turn a brand around. In 2009, for example, Domino's shared some videos from its internal focus groups on YouTube. "These video ...
